notes: aggregate of 3 process-level independent runs (frontend_parser_20260611_1..3.json); trial_medians = per-run trimmed means. in-process Instant timing covering parse only (tokens pre-lexed, cloned outside timed region); corpus = conformance/syntax concatenated (inner-attr samples excluded); zero-diagnostic sentinel enforced by parse_bench (exit 2 otherwise)
